title: coffea bonnieri var. diversifolia
intro: Coffea bonnieri var. diversifolia, also known as the forest coffee, is a rare and lesser-known species of coffee plant native to Madagascar. It is a shrub or small tree with a unique set of medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coffea bonnieri var. diversifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially treating certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are typically consumed in moderation due to its potential interactions with other medications.
